help: Focus pure energy into deadly melee attacks and powerful projectiles. The impact of the melee powers can often Disorient opponents, while the velocity of the ranged projectiles can send your enemies flying.
power_short_helps: Melee, High DMG(Smash/Energy), Disorient, Special, Chance for Energy Focus
Ranged, High DMG(Energy/Smash), Foe Knockback, Chance for Energy Focus
Ranged, Light DMG(Energy/Smash), Foe Knockback, Chance for Energy Focus
Ranged, Superior DMG(Energy/Smash), Foe Knockback, Special
Ranged Moderate DMG(Energy/Smash), Foe High Knockback, Chance for Energy Focus
Melee, Extreme DMG(Energy/Smash), Foe Disorient, +Energy Focus
